doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: This document purports to be from March 2026 (a future date), references a non-existent "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" (the EDPB was only established in 2018), and adopts a position that pseudonymized data can fall entirely outside GDPR scope for
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: This document purports to be from March 2026 (a future date), references a non-existent "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" (the EDPB was only established in 2018), and adopts a position—that pseudonymized data can fall entirely outside GDPR scope for non-key-holders—that contradicts established EDPB doctrine and Recital 26 GDPR, strongly indicating it is AI-generated fiction.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: This document purports to be from March 2026 (a future date), references a non-existent "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" (the EDPB was only established in 2018), and adopts a position that pseudonymized data can fall entirely outside GDPR scope for non-key-holders, contradicting established EDPB doctrine.
